channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Ariana Grande @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-07 03:00 → 2026-06-11 03:00 — Ariana Grande at Oakland Arena. Ariana Grande's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing her strong live reputation and pop appeal.

item.title: James Blake @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-12 02:00 — James Blake at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. James Blake's unique sound and emotional performances make this a must-see event.

item.title: The Pussycat Dolls @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-13 01:30 — The Pussycat Dolls at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Alesso is a prominent figure in electronic music, known for his high-energy live shows.

item.title: Bob Dylan @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-06-14 02:00 → 2026-06-15 01:30 — Bob Dylan at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Dylan's legacy and storytelling prowess continue to draw significant interest.

item.title: Pitbull @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-06-08 03:00 — Pitbull at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Pitbull's energetic performances and special guest Lil Jon promise a lively show.

item.title: Louis Tomlinson @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-07 02:00 — Louis Tomlinson at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Louis Tomlinson's solo tour is generating buzz, appealing to his dedicated fanbase.

item.title: Belle & Sebastian @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-11 03:00 → 2026-06-12 03:00 — Belle & Sebastian at The Masonic. Belle & Sebastian's nostalgic appeal and classic songs will resonate with long-time fans.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their engaging live performances and unique sound.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses' blend of electronic and live music creates a captivating concert experience.

item.title: Alesso @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-06 03:00 — Alesso at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Alesso's electronic music prowess ensures a high-energy show that fans will not want to miss.

item.title: Toadies @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-13 03:00 — Toadies at The Fillmore. Toadies are a beloved alt-rock band with a strong live reputation, appealing to nostalgic fans.

item.title: Corbyn Besson @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-17 03:00 — Corbyn Besson at The Fillmore. Corbyn Besson's tour is gaining traction among younger audiences, making it a relevant pick.

item.title: The Lemon Twigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-18 03:00 — The Lemon Twigs at The Fillmore. The Lemon Twigs offer a refreshing take on rock with their unique style and live energy.

item.title: Shakira @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-06-21 02:30 — Shakira at SAP Center at San Jose. Shakira's world tour promises to be a spectacular event, drawing her global fanbase.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone's rising popularity makes his tour a noteworthy event for pop music fans.

item.title: Pomplamoose @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-27 03:00 — Pomplamoose at The Fillmore. Pomplamoose's innovative approach to music and performance will attract a diverse audience.
